prompt_inputs.goal: Strength and power development for competitive weightlifting with muscle gain

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with specific timing around training
Macronutrient ratios support strength/power goals (high protein minimum 2.2g per kg body weight, adequate carbs for performance)
Includes at least one pre-workout and one post-workout meal strategically timed
Plan is concise and practical (fits in 1 page format)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (e.g., weightlifter or sprinter) with high caloric and protein requirements, specific macronutrient ratios, and meal timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare a 1-day meal plan for a distance runner with a 90-minute long run scheduled in the afternoon

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions with carbohydrate-focused meals and snacks to support endurance training
Pre-run meal (2-3 hours before) and intra-run hydration/fuel strategy are explicitly specified
Total daily carbohydrates support high-volume endurance work (approximately 8-10g per kg body weight)
Plan is compact and fits within 1 day format with realistic meal timing
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an endurance athlete (e.g., distance runner or cyclist) focusing on carbohydrate loading, hydration timing, and sustained energy management throughout long training days

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain lean muscle mass while reducing body weight by 2kg over 4 weeks for competition weigh-in in combat sports
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Low sodium (under 2000mg daily), no dairy, no processed foods

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for 1 day with specific foods and approximate portions
Total daily sodium content stays below 2000mg and complies with all dietary restrictions
Caloric intake supports gradual weight loss (approximately 300-500 calorie deficit) while maintaining protein for muscle preservation
Meals are practical, compact, and require minimal preparation time
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific constraint athlete (e.g., gymnast or combat sports competitor) with weight management goals, low-sodium requirements, and meals that balance performance with body composition control
